betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Alloy & Cobalt Armor§f

§aMid-tier combat armor with meaningful set bonuses.§f

§6Advanced Alloy Armor§f: 10 defense, 0.07 RR, 0.75 damage modifier.
§6Cobalt Armor§f: Upgrades FROM Steel Armor pieces. 10 defense, 0.12 RR, 0.7 damage modifier.

§6PaA Alloy Armor§f: No helmet (uses hazmat). Protection plates for chest/legs/feet. Requires PaA processing.

§eTip§f: Cobalt upgrades steel pieces — keep your old steel helmet and boots as bases. Advanced Alloy is a side-grade; Cobalt is the real upgrade.
